enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether the Kafka notification publisher should be enabled.

bootstrapServers.title: Kafka Bootstrap Servers
bootstrapServers.description: Addresses of servers that may be used to establish the initial connection to the Kafka cluster.

items.title: Kafka Server Address
items.description: Address of a Kafka server in `host:port` format.

producerConfigs.title: Producer Configs
producerConfigs.description: Additional [Kafka producer configs](https://kafka.apache.org/41/configuration/producer-configs/). May be used to configure mTLS and other advanced features. Must be provided in the form of `name=value`.
